included: mouse movement inside the chart grid
mouse clicking inside the chart grid
mouse dragging inside the chart grid
excluded_except_for_setup: top toolbar, except the layout button was used to attempt multi-chart setup
right watchlist/sidebar, except it was collapsed to measure the grid cleanly

tools_used: Playwright DOM snapshots through the Browser MCP
Playwright read-only DOM/CSS evaluation through the Browser MCP
Browser screenshot clips for visual verification
Browser console log inspection through tab.dev.logs
live_interactions_performed: collapsed the right sidebar to isolate the chart grid
opened the layout setup menu and attempted a four-chart grid
confirmed the live unauthenticated session is limited to one chart per tab
moved the mouse across chart canvas, candle/plot area, price scale, time scale, pane/price join, bottom-right corner, and top-right pane area
clicked chart canvas, price scale, time scale, pane/price join, axis corner, zoom in, zoom out, scroll left, scroll right, reset chart view, and scroll-to-most-recent controls
visual_confirmation: clipped screenshot confirmed the chart grid, candles, volume overlay, price line, legend, buy/sell boxes, and right price axis
after clicking/focusing the pane, clipped screenshot confirmed dashed crosshair lines, right-side hover price label, and bottom hover time label
mobile clipped screenshot confirmed the same chart-grid composition under a narrow viewport

notable_console_messages: TradingView telemetry POST failed to fetch
console_inspection_summary.interpretation: Observed console messages were site telemetry/auth/runtime warnings and did not correspond to chart-grid geometry, hover, click, or drag failures.

unavailable_tools.tool: Raw CDP / DevTools protocol tab capability
unavailable_tools.status: not advertised by the in-app Browser tab
unavailable_tools.effect: A full browser-native Accessibility tree and low-level performance trace could not be captured through CDP.

unavailable_tools.status: failed because Chromium executable was not installed in that MCP context
unavailable_tools.effect: MCP_DOCKER Playwright could not inspect TradingView.

unavailable_tools.status: available but isolated at about:blank and not connected to the in-app Browser page
unavailable_tools.effect: MCP_DOCKER Puppeteer could not inspect the live TradingView tab.

unavailable_tools.status: not available as a callable tool in this session
unavailable_tools.effect: Accessibility information is based on DOM snapshots, roles, aria-labels, and visible accessible names.

site_gates.observed_message: Your plan has 1 chart per tab limit. But our upgraded plans let you see up to 16 linked charts -- perfectly synced -- all in the same window.
site_gates.effect: True multi-pane layout, pane splitters, inactive-pane state, pane-specific maximize, and multi-pane restore could not be verified in this unauthenticated live session.

site_gates.observed_message: Look first / Then leap. Make every move count. Create a free account...
site_gates.effect: A non-dismissible modal appeared during one repeated click sweep. The page was reloaded and the unobstructed click tests were repeated.

screenshot_notes: A full-viewport screenshot initially timed out on the heavy TradingView page.
Clipped screenshots of the chart grid worked and were used for visual confirmation.
inspection_limitations.do_not_guess_policy: Unverified multi-pane behaviors are marked with requires_live_inspection rather than inferred as facts.

left_toolbar_offset.note: The chart grid starts after TradingView's left drawing toolbar. The toolbar itself is out of scope.

canvas_layers.interpretation: Plot canvases are scaled at 2x CSS size for high-density rendering.

mobile_single_pane.responsive_interpretation: TradingView preserves the fixed 64px price scale and 28px time scale, shrinking the plot pane to the remaining width and height.

layout_variants.name: single visible chart
layout_variants.sizing_model: absolute positioned chart container with fixed axis reservations and canvas layers
notes: The chart container fills the chart-grid width above the bottom chart toolbar.
The plot pane width equals chart container width minus 64px price scale.
The plot pane height equals chart container height minus 28px time scale.

layout_variants.name: multi-chart layouts
layout_variants.blocked_by: Unauthenticated plan limit: one chart per tab
layout_variants.builder_recommendation: Implement multi-chart layout as ratio-based rows and columns with splitter-resizable adjacent tracks. Mark exact TradingView splitter hitboxes and pane-maximize details as requiring a paid/live multi-chart inspection before claiming pixel-perfect parity.

volume_overlay.behavior: renders in the plot canvas, not as a separate DOM pane in the verified single-chart layout

legend.observed_text: Apple Inc · 1D · NASDAQ plus OHLC, change, current price, and volume

recommended_state.panes: array of pane objects with id, symbol, interval, row, column, rect, active, maximized, minimized
recommended_state.splitters: array of splitter objects with axis, previousPaneId, nextPaneId, rect

verified_areas.hover_state: legend remains visible; bottom zoom/scroll control bar appears when hovering near lower plot area
verified_areas.focus_changes: no DOM focus change; body remains active element
verified_areas.crosshair_verification: after clicking/focusing the pane and moving the mouse, dashed vertical and horizontal crosshair lines appeared with a black right price label and black bottom time label

verified_areas.hover_state: same as plot canvas; OHLC legend changes to hovered bar
verified_areas.highlight_behavior: crosshair intersects the hovered candle/time location; no DOM element is created for individual candles

verified_areas.hover_state: price labels remain visible; crosshair price label is shown after pane focus and hover
time labels remain visible; hover time label appears after pane focus and mouse movement

verified_areas.hit_element: price-axis canvas at the exact join

verified_areas.hover_state: no pane focus change; corner remains an axis-control/corner surface

verified_areas.note: In the one-pane layout no pane-specific top-right maximize/minimize button was present.

tooltip_behavior.observed: Many chart controls expose tooltip text through aria-label and apply-common-tooltip classes.
tooltip_behavior.visible_popup_tooltips: Short hover waits did not consistently create a separate visible tooltip DOM node for the grid controls.
tooltip_behavior.builder_requirement: Use aria-label/title strings for controls and show lightweight delayed tooltips for icon-only controls.

verified_clicks.before_state: single chart container active; no dialog; pane rect 1271x791
verified_clicks.after_state: single chart container remains active; no dialog; pane rect unchanged
verified_clicks.visual_change: crosshair and legend update to clicked/hovered bar
no immediate geometry change from click alone
no immediate geometry change from click alone
internal time scale zooms in; hovered legend values changed because the same screen x maps to a different bar
internal time range scrolls left; hovered legend values changed
internal visible range resets; control can hide after reset

verified_clicks.target: scroll to most recent bar control
verified_clicks.visual_change: internal time range returns to latest bars; hovered legend returned to latest AAPL values

modal_interference.details: A sign-up modal appeared during one repeated click sweep and blocked subsequent click targets. The page was reloaded and click tests were repeated without the modal.
modal_interference.builder_requirement: Do not model promotional modals as part of the chart-grid system.

click_behavior.click_formula: If hit is inside pane rect, preserve pane geometry, set activePaneId to pane id, update hover/crosshair state from localX/localY. If hit is an in-grid control, run that control action without changing pane rects unless the action is explicitly layout-related.

verified_drags.name: chart canvas horizontal pan
verified_drags.observed_effect: visible time range panned; hovered legend changed from latest AAPL values to an earlier bar
verified_drags.unit_model: internal time-scale transform, not CSS position or pane pixels

verified_drags.name: chart canvas vertical drag
verified_drags.observed_effect: pane geometry did not resize; hover/crosshair state and legend changed at the final pointer location
verified_drags.note: No pane-size change occurred from vertical canvas drag in the verified single-pane layout.

verified_drags.name: price scale vertical drag
verified_drags.observed_effect: price range scaled vertically; after the drag the visible price-axis range expanded in the screenshot while pane geometry stayed fixed
verified_drags.resize_formula: priceScaleTransform = f(startScale, deltaY); exact TradingView transform curve not exposed in DOM

verified_drags.name: time scale horizontal drag
verified_drags.observed_effect: visible time range panned; hovered legend changed to a different bar

verified_drags.name: pane / price-axis join drag
verified_drags.observed_effect: no splitter handle appeared and pane/axis widths did not change
verified_drags.unit_model: not a pane splitter in the verified single-pane layout

unverified_drags.name: pane divider horizontal splitter drag
unverified_drags.reason: no multi-pane layout available in this session

unverified_drags.name: pane divider vertical splitter drag
unverified_drags.reason: no multi-pane layout available in this session

notes: No pane-specific maximize button was visible in the single-pane top-right chart area.
Searches for maximize, minimize, restore, collapse, expand, and fullscreen inside the chart grid found no pane maximize control.
The top toolbar has a Fullscreen mode button, but it is outside the chart-grid scope and is not the pane maximize requested here.

multi_pane_maximize.blocked_by: one chart per tab plan limit
multi_pane_maximize.builder_requirement: Implement pane maximize only when a multi-pane grid is supported. Store the full pre-maximize layout snapshot before hiding or covering sibling panes.

button_location.reason: pane-specific maximize control was not visible in the one-pane layout

restore_trigger.reason: pane-specific restore could not be reached

notes: No direct minimize, collapse, or pane-hide control was visible in the verified single-pane chart grid.
Indicator legend controls include Hide/Remove actions for studies, but these are not pane minimize controls.
Multi-pane minimize/collapse behavior remains unverified because multi-pane layout is gated.

multi_pane_minimize.reason: pane minimize may exist only in multi-pane layouts or paid sessions; it was not visible here

reset_chart_view.behavior: resets internal visible time/price view without changing chart, pane, price-axis, or time-axis rectangles

scroll_to_most_recent.behavior: returns the internal time transform to latest bars without changing DOM geometry

maximize_restore.reason: pane-specific maximize was unavailable in the verified single-pane session

minimize_restore.reason: pane-specific minimize/collapse was unavailable in the verified single-pane session

single_pane_verified.dom_focus: document.activeElement remained body or a generic div; active pane is represented by TradingView chart state/classes, not native DOM focus

multi_pane_expected_builder_behavior.recommendation: Clicking any pane canvas, axis, or pane-local control should set activePaneId to that pane. Inactive panes should remain rendered, with only subtle active border/control emphasis changing.

bottom_control_bar.name: Scroll to the most recent bar

visibility_rules: Top-left legend and price/time axes are always visible.
Legend indicator controls are visible while the legend row is hovered or active.
Bottom zoom/scroll/reset controls appear near the lower plot area when the grid is hovered or after chart interaction.
Reset/latest controls can hide after the chart is already reset or at the latest bar.

formulas: isInsidePlot = localX >= 0 && localX <= CW && localY >= 0 && localY <= CH
isInsidePriceScale = mouseX >= Gx + CW && mouseX <= Gx + GW && mouseY >= Gy && mouseY <= Gy + CH
isInsideTimeScale = mouseX >= Gx && mouseX <= Gx + CW && mouseY >= Gy + CH && mouseY <= Gy + GH

canvas_pixel_ratio.formula: canvasBackingWidth = cssWidth * internalPixelRatio; canvasBackingHeight = cssHeight * internalPixelRatio
canvas_pixel_ratio.builder_requirement: Render canvases at device/internal pixel ratio and scale drawing commands so CSS geometry stays exact.

multi_pane_recommended_model.representation: normalized ratios with pixel rects derived on every resize
multi_pane_recommended_model.builder_note: Use ratios for resizable layouts, but store computed pixel rects for hit-testing and canvas sizing.

verified_single_pane.join_drag_result: no pane or axis dimensions changed

multi_pane_model_for_builder.visual_requirement: During drag, show a thin divider/handle highlight and update pane canvases continuously or on pointerup depending performance.

maximize_restore_math.expected_grid_fill_rule: Maximized pane should fill only the chart-grid area, not the whole page, unless a separate out-of-scope fullscreen mode is used.

hidden_pane: remaining panes redistribute saved pane size

hitbox_math.generic_hit_formula: hit = mouseX >= x1 && mouseX <= x2 && mouseY >= y1 && mouseY <= y2
hitbox_math.builder_requirement: Keep hitboxes stable and at least 20x20px for icon controls; use a larger pointer target than the drawn glyph if needed.

rules: The chart grid begins after the left toolbar at x=56 in both tested desktop and mobile views.
The right price scale keeps a fixed 64px CSS width in both tested desktop and mobile views.
The bottom time scale keeps a fixed 28px CSS height in both tested desktop and mobile views.
The plot pane receives the remaining chart-container width and height.
Canvas backing dimensions are larger than CSS dimensions for high-density rendering.
On narrow screens, the price scale consumes a larger share of chart width; preserve its readability instead of shrinking it aggressively.

verified_states.description: One active chart pane visible with plot, price scale, time scale, and in-grid controls.
Pointer is over plot canvas; cursor is crosshair; legend/crosshair can update.
Pointer drag over plot or time axis mutates internal time transform; layout rects unchanged.
Pointer drag over price scale mutates internal price transform; layout rects unchanged.
Reset/latest controls restore internal chart view without changing pane geometry.

recommended_builder_transitions: normal_single_pane -> hovering_plot on pointermove inside plot
hovering_plot -> dragging_time on pointerdown+drag inside plot or time scale
hovering_plot -> dragging_price_scale on pointerdown+drag inside price scale
normal_multi_pane -> dragging_splitter on pointerdown over splitter hitbox
normal_multi_pane -> pane_maximized on pane maximize click
normal_multi_pane -> pane_minimized on pane minimize click if supported
pane_minimized -> normal_multi_pane on restore click if supported

components_to_build: MinimizeRestoreController if future live inspection confirms it exists
state_to_store: priceScaleWidth = 64px unless theming/responsive inspection updates it
events_to_handle: pointerdown/pointermove/pointerup on plot pane for time panning
pointerdown/pointermove/pointerup on time scale for time panning
pointerdown/pointermove/pointerup on price scale for price scaling
click on pane to set active pane
click on price/time scale without changing layout
click on scroll to most recent
pointerdown/pointermove/pointerup on splitters in multi-pane layouts
click maximize/restore only when a pane-specific control exists
click minimize/restore only if a pane-specific minimize control is later verified
behavior_must_match: price scale and time scale cursor are default
axis sizes remain fixed at the verified 64px/28px values in desktop and mobile measurements
chart panning and zooming mutate internal transforms rather than DOM pane geometry
price scale vertical drag rescales price range without changing DOM geometry
time scale horizontal drag pans time without changing DOM geometry
single-pane price-axis join is not a splitter
crosshair appears after pane focus/hover with dashed vertical and horizontal lines plus axis labels
legend OHLC/volume values update to the hovered bar
bottom control bar actions preserve pane rectangles
behavior_can_be_approximated: exact TradingView price-scale transform curve from vertical drag
exact TradingView time-scale transform coefficient from pixel delta
TradingView's delayed tooltip timing and animation
internal class names and multi-canvas layering, as long as visible geometry and interactions match
must_not_implement: fake multi-pane maximize/minimize behavior labeled as verified
builder_agent_requirements.multi_pane_caution: The builder may implement a conventional TradingView-like ratio grid with splitters, but exact TradingView multi-pane splitter and pane maximize/minimize details require a paid or otherwise enabled live inspection.

implementation_tasks.details: Reserve 64px for the right price scale and 28px for the bottom time scale; compute plot pane as remaining area.
Use high-DPI canvas backing sizes and strict clipping for plot, price axis, time axis, and corner layers.
On focused/hovered pane, draw dashed vertical/horizontal lines and synchronized right price/bottom time labels.
Map localX to the hovered bar and update OHLC/volume values without changing layout.
Canvas horizontal drags and time-axis horizontal drags update timeScaleTransform; pane rects remain unchanged.
Price-axis vertical drags update priceScaleTransform; pane rects remain unchanged.
Zoom, scroll, reset, and latest controls mutate internal transforms only.
Single pane starts active; in multi-pane layouts, clicks set activePaneId.
Use normalized row/column ratios, splitter hitboxes, and min-size constraints; mark exact TradingView parity as pending live verification.
Store rows, columns, paneRects, and activePaneId before maximizing. Restore within 1-3px tolerance.
No minimize/collapse control was verified in the live single-pane grid.

assertions: chart grid origin and size are stable
plotWidth = gridWidth - 64
plotHeight = chartHeight - 28
priceScaleWidth = 64
timeScaleHeight = 28
priceScaleWidth remains 64
timeScaleHeight remains 28
plot pane shrinks to remaining width
no horizontal overflow inside chart grid
cursor is crosshair
crosshair lines draw after focus/hover
right price hover label is visible
bottom time hover label is visible
legend values update
clicking plot keeps pane active
clicking price scale does not resize layout
clicking time scale does not resize layout
clicking axis corner does not resize layout
horizontal plot drag changes visible time range
time-axis drag changes visible time range
pane rects do not change
vertical price-axis drag changes visible price range
pane and axis rects do not change
dragging the price-axis join does not create a splitter
pane width and price-axis width remain unchanged
zoom in/out mutate internal time transform
scroll left/right mutate internal time transform
reset/latest restore internal view
DOM geometry remains unchanged
splitter drags conserve total adjacent pane size
min pane constraints are enforced
row/column ratios update
snapshot saved before maximize
other panes hidden/covered/collapsed according to verified TradingView behavior
restore returns pane rects within 1-3px tolerance

acceptance_criteria: A builder can recreate the verified single-pane grid geometry without re-inspecting TradingView.
Desktop and mobile axis reservations match observed values: 64px price scale and 28px time scale.
Canvas, price scale, time scale, and corner hit areas use the documented coordinate formulas.
Plot hover uses crosshair cursor and crosshair overlay after focus.
Chart canvas and time-axis drags pan time without changing DOM geometry.
Price-axis vertical drags scale price without changing DOM geometry.
Bottom grid controls mutate internal transforms, not layout.
Single-pane mode does not expose pane splitters, maximize, or minimize controls.
Unverified multi-pane, splitter, maximize, and minimize behavior is clearly marked requires_live_inspection.

requires_live_inspection.reason: TradingView gated layouts beyond one chart per tab in this session.

requires_live_inspection.item: vertical and horizontal pane splitter hitboxes
requires_live_inspection.reason: No multi-pane grid could be activated.

requires_live_inspection.item: pane-specific maximize button location, icon shape, tooltip text, and restore behavior
requires_live_inspection.reason: No pane maximize control appeared in the verified single-pane grid.

requires_live_inspection.item: whether maximize hides, removes, collapses, or covers sibling panes
pane-specific minimize/collapse existence and restore behavior in multi-pane layouts
requires_live_inspection.reason: No minimize/collapse control appeared in the verified single-pane grid.

requires_live_inspection.item: inactive pane hover and active pane switching
exact mathematical transform coefficient for price-axis drag
requires_live_inspection.reason: TradingView exposes the result visually but not through stable DOM state.

requires_live_inspection.item: exact mathematical transform coefficient for time-axis drag
requires_live_inspection.reason: TradingView exposes the result visually but not through stable DOM state.
Dedicated AX/CDP inspection was unavailable; DOM snapshot roles/labels were inspected instead.

unknowns: Exact TradingView row/column ratio serialization for saved multi-chart layouts.
Exact multi-pane splitter DOM class names and cursor styles.
Exact pane-specific maximize and restore button hitbox in multi-pane layouts.
Whether multi-pane maximize hides sibling panes with display none, visibility hidden, zero-size collapse, or an overlay stack.
Whether multi-pane minimize exists for chart panes or only for indicator/study panes.
Exact tolerance TradingView uses when restoring ratios after splitter drag or maximize restore.
Exact easing/debounce behavior during splitter drags.
Exact internal coefficients mapping mouse delta to price-scale zoom and time-scale pan.
Whether TradingView changes price scale width for other locales, fonts, instruments, or user settings.
